creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The port was updated some time ago. Package for 8.2-RELEASE will stay on 
b13, as release packages are not updated, but 8-STABLE packages are and 
these already have b16 - 
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-8-stable/games/widelands-b16.tbz 
which you can use on 8.2-RELEASE as well, taking usual care about 
possible version mismatch of dependencies. See also handbook section 
4.4.1 including "Note" there.
